2605.18696.title: Ensembling Tabular Foundation Models - A Diversity Ceiling And A Calibration Trap
2605.18696.paper_summary: Tabular foundation models (TFMs) now match or beat tuned gradient-boosted trees on a growing fraction of tabular tasks, but no single TFM wins on every dataset. Ensembling is the go to fix here, and it works less well than expected. Six modern TFMs form a near-redundant pool: their mean pairwise Q-statistic is $0.961$, close enough to $1$ that any convex combination is bounded above. We benchmark six ensemble strategies over six TFMs on 153 OpenML classification tasks. The best ensemble, two-level cascade stacking, buys $+0.18\%$ accuracy over the strongest single TFM at $253\times$ the compute. A Friedman and Nemenyi analysis places three ensembles and the best base TFM in a single equivalence group; three other ensembles are significantly \emph{worse} than the best base. Stacking with a logistic-regression meta-learner is the most striking case: competitive accuracy and ROC-AUC, the worst log-loss rank among the ensembles. The meta-learner improves accuracy by sharpening class boundaries, which destroys calibration. We recommend greedy selection as the practical default.
2605.18696.paper_summary_zh: 表格基礎模型（TFMs）現在在越來越多的表格任務中達到或超越調整過的梯度提升樹，但沒有單一的 TFM 在每個數據集上獲勝。集成是這裡的首選解決方案，但其效果不如預期。六個現代 TFM 形成了一個幾乎冗餘的池：它們的平均成對 Q 統計量為 $0.961$，接近 $1$，以至於任何凸組合都受到上界限制。我們在 153 個 OpenML 分類任務上對六種集成策略進行了基準測試，這六種 TFM。最佳集成，兩級級聯堆疊，提供了 $+0.18\%$ 的準確率，超過最強的單一 TFM，但計算量為 $253\times$。Friedman 和 Nemenyi 分析將三個集成和最佳基礎 TFM 放在同一等價組中；另外三個集成顯著地比最佳基礎差。使用邏輯回歸元學習者的堆疊是最引人注目的案例：競爭性的準確率和 ROC-AUC，但在集成中擁有最差的對數損失排名。元學習者通過鋒利化類別邊界來提高準確率，這破壞了校準。我們建議貪婪選擇作為實際的默認方案。
2605.18696.author: Aditya Tanna et.al.
2605.18696.authors: Aditya Tanna, Yash Desai, Pratinav Seth, Mohamed Bouadi, Nassim Bouarour, Vinay Kumar Sankarapu
